Name: Parameter Sweep
Description: Iterates over a JSON array of parameter sets, firing one execution per entry. Each entry's fields are exposed as state outputs for downstream cards. Use for batch experiments with different seeds, models, LoRAs, guidance scales, etc.

EventInputs.Name: BeginSweep
EventInputs.Description: Start iterating through the parameter array

EventInputs.Name: StepComplete
EventInputs.Description: Signal that the current parameter set has been fully processed by downstream tasks

EventOutputs.Name: ParameterSetReady
EventOutputs.Description: Fired for each parameter set in the array. Downstream tasks receive the current parameters via state connections.

EventOutputs.Name: SweepComplete
EventOutputs.Description: Fired after all parameter sets have been processed.

EventOutputs.Name: Error
EventOutputs.Description: Fired if the parameter array is invalid or empty.

SettingsInputs.Name: ParameterSets
SettingsInputs.Description: JSON array of objects. Each object is one set of parameters to sweep through. Example: [{"seed": 42, "guidance": 5.0}, {"seed": 123, "guidance": 7.0}]

StateOutputs.Name: CurrentParameters
StateOutputs.Description: JSON string of the current parameter set object (e.g., {"seed": 42, "guidance": 5.0})

StateOutputs.Name: CurrentIndex
StateOutputs.Description: 0-based index of the current parameter set

StateOutputs.Name: TotalCount
StateOutputs.Description: Total number of parameter sets in the array

StateOutputs.Name: CompletedCount
StateOutputs.Description: Number of parameter sets fully processed so far
